results.title: ED claims Rs 164cr discrepancy in TMC account expenses, questions bank
results.description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has flagged a discrepancy of Rs 164 crore with regard to the expenses shown in the main bank account of the Trinamul Congress, sources said on Saturday.

results.title: Iran's supreme leader warns of 'unforgettable lessons' if US continues attacks
results.description: Iran's supreme leader issued stern warnings after the United States conducted further strikes. Tehran announced it is suspending commitments to a recently signed interim deal. Kuwait reported significant damage to its water and oil facilities from Iranian attacks. US airstrikes targeted infrastructure in Iran's southern Hormozgan province. Both nations continue to vie for control of the vital Strait of Hormuz waterway.
